Describe the sequence of actions involving the bread and zucchini from the beginning of the video until the title card appears.
canonical_answer: At 0s, a child holds a green zucchini while sliced bread sits on a board; at 4s, a child's hand rests on the unsliced loaf next to flat slices; at 6s, a knife spreads butter onto a slice of brown zucchini bread; at 12s, a young girl holds a slice of bread in each hand.
